headline: 3 Communication Stocks Set to Soar on Inherent Sector Strength
summary: Increased fiber densification, cloud focus and accelerated pace of 5G deployment should help the Zacks Communication - Components industry thrive despite short-term headwinds. GLW, VIAV and OOMA are well-positioned to make the most of the demand for seamless connectivity solutions.

headline: Ericsson Q2 Earnings Meet Estimates Despite Margin Resilience
summary: ERIC Q2 earnings meet estimates but revenues miss as lower IPR licensing sales hurt the results despite stronger margins in key businesses.
